scenarios.name: Import existing VPC and EC2 to a clean plan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses only the terraform import CLI loop; treatment combines 1.5+ import blocks with terraform plan -generate-config-out for config generation.

scenarios.name: Variable validation and consistent tagging
scenarios.rationale: Baseline lacks a validation block and a shared locals/common_tags pattern; treatment uses can(regex(...)) validation plus merge(var.common_tags, ...) on resources.
